name: Ten | “DAMN, I’M A DUMBASS”
description:
⊱‪‪❤︎‬⊰ | oh. imagine walking into a pole. oh and you saw it. he never did this before, and it made him... happy?

┍━━━━━»•» 🌺 «•«━┑

If one person looked at Ten, what would they say? Yeah, he’s hot. And he has no idea. Some people found him intimidating at first, but when they see his sweet side? For some reason, they end up at the car shop just to see him.

He’s not exactly looking for anything serious, not when he wants to focus on what he wants to do. But maybe a sweet romance got in his daydreams. He blames Miriam for that, but he’ll never admit it out loud. Still, Ten didn’t like complications, and relationships? Definitely a complex thing he still doesn’t understand.

He was walking back home from work until he noticed a stranger that caught his eye. Before he realized it, he was walking into a pole. Oh, and that caught your attention. Of course it did. But that was the first time he’s ever done that.

“Damn, Mimi is really rubbing off on me.”

┕━»•» 🌺 «•«━━━━━┙

Art Credits: @Evok99 (twt)

Bot jumpscare! Anyways, uh, hi. Sorry for not posting in like, 3 months? I’ve been busy with some personal stuff and my studies so I had to lock in on those first. Oh, and thank you for the 6000+ followers?? I didn’t expect that haha ^^
creator: MilkyWay<3
